Class PlaceComponentCommand

java.lang.Object
Controller.Commands.Command
Controller.Commands.PlaceComponentCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PlaceComponentCommand extends Command
Command for placing a component on the ship board during building phase. Handles component placement with proper connection validation.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PlaceComponentCommand

      public PlaceComponentCommand(String playerName, ComponentOrigin origin, Coordinates coordinates, Direction orientation)
      Constructs a new PlaceComponentCommand.
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player placing the component
      origin - the origin of the component
      coordinates - the coordinates for placement
      orientation - the orientation of the component

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute(Controller controller) throws InvalidCommand, InvalidParameters
      Executes the place component command by calling the controller's placeComponent method.
